div.head: The Ambassador in the Soviet Union (Bohlen) to the Department of State
div.p: 1313. Repeated information priority Paris 282, priority Geneva 8. Embtel 1304, repeated information Paris 279, Geneva 7, April 23.Not printed.
Soviets have sent us following reply to note given them yesterday re Geneva conference.

quote.p: “In connection with note Government United States of America 23 AprilSee Annex A to the minutes of the meeting of Apr. 22, p. 130. Government of USSR considers it necessary to state it confirms its position on question of composition Geneva conference as set forth in note April 20.Text in telegram 1289 from Moscow, Apr. 21. p. 126.

With reference to invitations interested states to participate in discussion problem re-establishing peace in Indochina, it goes without saying that this question is matter for consideration of representatives those states whose participation on basis equality is directly provided for in Berlin communiqué”.
